## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential accounting and financial services partnership between GrowthX Labs and Optima Office.](https://fathom.video/share/phDVL_rDdvjg_DxsfrSusJXqQ-Cp1Cvt?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX Labs is a new AI services company (\~$500k MRR) with 24 contractors across 15 countries, transitioning to C-corp and seeking Series A funding](https://fathom.video/share/phDVL_rDdvjg_DxsfrSusJXqQ-Cp1Cvt?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [Optima Office offers scalable, hourly-based accounting, finance, and HR services with a team of 100 employees including CFOs, controllers, and bookkeepers](https://fathom.video/share/phDVL_rDdvjg_DxsfrSusJXqQ-Cp1Cvt?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
  - [Bridget is considering a combination of Pilot (for basic bookkeeping) and a known controller, but open to Optima's services for potential CFO support and HR assistance](https://fathom.video/share/phDVL_rDdvjg_DxsfrSusJXqQ-Cp1Cvt?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Labs Company Overview

  - [Recently transitioned from LLC to C-corp (3 weeks ago)](https://fathom.video/share/phDVL_rDdvjg_DxsfrSusJXqQ-Cp1Cvt?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [Currently pursuing Series A funding](https://fathom.video/share/phDVL_rDdvjg_DxsfrSusJXqQ-Cp1Cvt?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [$500k Monthly Recurring Revenue (MRR)](https://fathom.video/share/phDVL_rDdvjg_DxsfrSusJXqQ-Cp1Cvt?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [24 contractors across 15 countries, planning to mix contractors and full-time employees](https://fathom.video/share/phDVL_rDdvjg_DxsfrSusJXqQ-Cp1Cvt?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [AI services company with an agency-like model to customers, aiming to build more SaaS-like backend](https://fathom.video/share/phDVL_rDdvjg_DxsfrSusJXqQ-Cp1Cvt?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)

### Optima Office Services and Structure

  - [100 employees, primarily in San Diego with 20 across the US](https://fathom.video/share/phDVL_rDdvjg_DxsfrSusJXqQ-Cp1Cvt?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)
  - [Offers hourly-based services: bookkeepers, staff accountants, controllers, CFOs, and HR specialists](https://fathom.video/share/phDVL_rDdvjg_DxsfrSusJXqQ-Cp1Cvt?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
  - [Scalable model allows clients to adjust service levels as they grow](https://fathom.video/share/phDVL_rDdvjg_DxsfrSusJXqQ-Cp1Cvt?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
  - [CFOs focus on forward-looking strategies, forecasting, and high-level decision-making](https://fathom.video/share/phDVL_rDdvjg_DxsfrSusJXqQ-Cp1Cvt?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Controllers handle historical data, financial reporting, and systems/processes](https://fathom.video/share/phDVL_rDdvjg_DxsfrSusJXqQ-Cp1Cvt?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Accounting and Finance Options for GrowthX

  - [Bridget considering Pilot ($700/month) for basic bookkeeping, partnered with their VCs](https://fathom.video/share/phDVL_rDdvjg_DxsfrSusJXqQ-Cp1Cvt?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Optima suggests potential combination of their services (controller, staff accountant, CFO) could be more comprehensive for $6-7k/month](https://fathom.video/share/phDVL_rDdvjg_DxsfrSusJXqQ-Cp1Cvt?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
  - [Discussion of trade-offs between full-time hires vs. fractional services](https://fathom.video/share/phDVL_rDdvjg_DxsfrSusJXqQ-Cp1Cvt?tab=summary&timestamp=766.0)

### HR and HRIS Considerations

  - [GrowthX needs to choose an HRIS system, considering Rippling and Deel for international and EOR capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/phDVL_rDdvjg_DxsfrSusJXqQ-Cp1Cvt?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)
  - [Optima uses Perform Yard for HRIS and Paycor for payroll, recommends separating these systems](https://fathom.video/share/phDVL_rDdvjg_DxsfrSusJXqQ-Cp1Cvt?tab=summary&timestamp=1483.0)
  - [Potential challenges with 401k integration in some systems like Rippling](https://fathom.video/share/phDVL_rDdvjg_DxsfrSusJXqQ-Cp1Cvt?tab=summary&timestamp=1585.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bridget to meet with potential controller candidate and assess fit with Marcel (CEO)](https://fathom.video/share/phDVL_rDdvjg_DxsfrSusJXqQ-Cp1Cvt?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)
  - [Evaluate controller's preference for working with Pilot or alternative solutions](https://fathom.video/share/phDVL_rDdvjg_DxsfrSusJXqQ-Cp1Cvt?tab=summary&timestamp=1397.0)
  - [Consider Optima's CFO services post-fundraise for strategic planning](https://fathom.video/share/phDVL_rDdvjg_DxsfrSusJXqQ-Cp1Cvt?tab=summary&timestamp=1414.0)
  - [Explore Optima's HR support services once HRIS system is selected](https://fathom.video/share/phDVL_rDdvjg_DxsfrSusJXqQ-Cp1Cvt?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
  - [Bridget to follow up if interested in Optima's services after finalizing immediate team structure](https://fathom.video/share/phDVL_rDdvjg_DxsfrSusJXqQ-Cp1Cvt?tab=summary&timestamp=1682.0)
